content:
✨ DyberPet | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide users with an interactive and customizable virtual pet experience on their desktop, enhanced with AI capabilities.
✨ Key Features: • Animated desktop pets with interactive features • AI assistant integration for chat and task management • Extensible MOD ecosystem for characters, items, and mini-pets • Task and quest systems • In-game shop functionality
📖 Summary: DyberPet is a desktop cyber pet framework built with PySide6, allowing users to have interactive animated characters on their desktop. It supports extensive customization through a modding ecosystem for characters, items, and mini-pets, and integrates AI assistants for enhanced user interaction and daily task management.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
